mapper.select: select count(*) from t_dogather where dg_title=#{dg_title}
select dg_index from t_dogather where dg_title=#{dg_title}

select d.dg_index, u.user_index, u.user_nickname, d.dg_reg_date, d.category_index, d.dg_title, d.dg_intro, d.dg_intro_short, d.dg_banner_org, d.dg_banner_sys, dg_public_scope, d.dg_hits, d.dg_capacity, d.dg_limit_scope, d.dg_expire, d.dg_inactive from t_dogather d join t_user u on u.user_index=d.user_index where d.dg_inactive=0 and d.dg_public_scope=1 and d.category_index like('%${category_index}%') and(case when d.dg_expire is not null then d.dg_expire>now() else d.dg_expire is null end) and(d.dg_title like('%${keyword}%') or d.dg_intro like('%${keyword}%') or d.dg_intro_short like('%${keyword}%') or u.user_nickname like('%${keyword}%')) order by d.${criteria} ${align} limit #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from t_dogather d left join(select user_nickname,user_index from t_user) u on d.user_index=u.user_index where d.dg_inactive=0 and d.dg_public_scope=1 and d.category_index like('%${category_index}%') and d.dg_expire>now() and(d.dg_title like('%${keyword}%') or d.dg_intro like('%${keyword}%') or d.dg_intro_short like('%${keyword}%') or u.user_nickname like('%${keyword}%'))
